steps.title: Use the symmetry shortcut
steps.content: The equation $|x-9|=18$ has solutions $18$ units away from $9$: $$x=9+18=27 \quad \text{and} \quad x=9-18=-9.$$

steps.title: Sum the solutions
steps.content: $$27+(-9)=18.$$ Shortcut: the solutions are centered at $9$, so their sum is $2(9)=18$. The answer is 18.
